channel.title: Belltown Community Council
channel.description: Upcoming events for Belltown Community Council

item.title: BCC Meeting: SDOT City Arborist + Elliott/Western Ave Mobility Project
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Partners in Print , 402 Cedar St

The Belltown Community Council welcomes Seattle's Department of Transportation (SDOT). Representatives from the Elliott Avenue and Western Avenue Mobility Project will present early designs and gather feedback. And we have the City Arborist, Nolan Rundquist! Bring all your questions about street trees. See you at Partners in Print , 402 Cedar St (6:30pm as usual) and thanks to them for hosting us!

Event details
